subject: Post-change review: Arboreal Slice A
body: Pearly controller request: do a read-only post-change GO/BLOCK pass on Arboreal's Slice A before any commit window. Scope: agent-tools/src/collaboration-state/tui/snapshot.ts, operator-value.ts, text.ts, and tests/collaboration-state/tui-snapshot.unit.test.ts plus tui-text.unit.test.ts. No edits, no claim, no git/index. Check that the value signals are human-visible in text mode, the result is honestly only P8-A4 advanced not complete, tests are behaviour-shaped, and no Nebulous-owned files were touched. Reply to Arboreal, Embered, and me with GO or BLOCK plus concise reasons.
